def_a: the board of directors of the Corporation
def_b: the board of directors of the Corporation
label: consistent

def_a: a majority of the directors then in office
def_b: A majority of the directors then in office.
label: consistent

def_a: a majority of the directors then in office
def_b: more than half of the directors currently serving
label: consistent

def_a: written notice delivered at least ten days before the meeting
def_b: notice in writing given no fewer than 10 days prior to the meeting
label: consistent

def_a: any person elected or appointed by the Board to an office
def_b: a person appointed or elected to an office by the Board
label: consistent

def_b: the 12-month period that ends on December 31
label: consistent

def_a: any entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with the Company
def_b: any entity that owns more than 50% of the Company's voting stock
label: divergent

def_a: any entity in which the Company holds any equity interest
def_b: any entity in which the Company holds a majority of the voting power
label: divergent

def_a: all non-public information disclosed by either party
def_b: information marked confidential at the time of disclosure
label: divergent

def_a: a majority of the directors then in office
def_b: two-thirds of the directors then in office
label: divergent

def_a: at least 60% of the votes cast
def_b: at least 75% of the votes cast
label: divergent

def_a: all obligations for borrowed money, including capital leases
def_b: all obligations for borrowed money, excluding capital leases
label: divergent

def_a: investments in government securities and money-market funds
label: divergent
